rawAssistant: A balanced formation is key. Your lead, the Thornbeast, has enough strength to hold its own, but your Gremlin Ally brings a nice balance of speed and agility. Don't forget that experience and positioning are just as important as raw power – make sure you're all working together, using terrain to your advantage. And always keep an eye on your party's morale; a calm lead is crucial in tough situations.
